---
title: "Munich EV Adoption"
---

Munich's [Monatszahlen KFZ-Bestand](https://opendata.muenchen.de/dataset/monatszahlen-kfz-bestand)
dataset tracks the monthly *registered fleet* of vehicles by fuel type, published
by the Statistisches Amt München since 1992. It records how many cars run on
petrol, diesel, electricity, hybrid, or LPG — a direct measure of the
energy-transition in Munich's roads.

The data is a single full-history CSV that the portal replaces each month. The
[`@incremental`](../reference/incremental.incremental.qmd) pipeline downloads it
into a date-stamped staging file and upserts into a Delta Lake table, ensuring
revised numbers are corrected without creating duplicates.

**Data source:** Statistisches Amt München ·
License: [Datenlizenz Deutschland – Namensnennung 2.0](https://www.govdata.de/dl-de/by-2-0)

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os
from pathlib import Path

import altair as alt
import polars as pl
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

BUCKET = os.environ.get("MUNICH_CYCLING_BUCKET", "data-warehousing-with-polars")
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
df = (
    pl.scan_delta(f"s3://{BUCKET}/delta/munich_vehicles")
    .select("MONATSZAHL", "AUSPRAEGUNG", "JAHR", "WERT", "date")
    .collect()
    .sort("date")
)
df.head(5)
```

## Fleet by fuel type

Total registered passenger cars (Pkw) in Munich by fuel type over time, focusing
on the shift away from diesel and petrol toward electric and hybrid drivetrains.

```{python}
#| echo: false
# Focus on Pkw-Kraftstoffarten (fleet stock by fuel type), private+commercial combined
fuel = (
    df.filter(
        (pl.col("MONATSZAHL") == "Pkw-Kraftstoffarten")
        & ~pl.col("AUSPRAEGUNG").str.ends_with("gewerblich")
        & ~pl.col("AUSPRAEGUNG").str.ends_with("privat")
    )
    .drop_nulls("WERT")
)

# Rename for cleaner labels
fuel = fuel.with_columns(
    pl.col("AUSPRAEGUNG")
    .replace({
        "Elektro": "Electric",
        "Benzin": "Petrol",
        "Diesel": "Diesel",
        "Hybrid": "Hybrid",
        "Flüssiggas": "LPG",
        "Gas": "Gas",
    })
    .alias("fuel_type")
)

palette = {
    "Electric": "#27ae60",
    "Hybrid":   "#f39c12",
    "Petrol":   "#3498db",
    "Diesel":   "#e74c3c",
    "LPG":      "#9b59b6",
    "Gas":      "#95a5a6",
}

color_scale = alt.Scale(
    domain=list(palette.keys()),
    range=list(palette.values()),
)

selection = alt.selection_point(fields=["fuel_type"], bind="legend")

alt.Chart(fuel).mark_line(strokeWidth=2).encode(
    x=alt.X("date:T", title="Month"),
    y=alt.Y("WERT:Q", title="Registered cars", axis=alt.Axis(format="~s")),
    color=alt.Color(
        "fuel_type:N",
        scale=color_scale,
        legend=alt.Legend(title="Fuel type"),
    ),
    opacity=alt.condition(selection, alt.value(1), alt.value(0.15)),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("date:T", title="Month", format="%b %Y"),
        alt.Tooltip("fuel_type:N", title="Fuel type"),
        alt.Tooltip("WERT:Q", title="Cars", format=",.0f"),
    ],
).add_params(selection).properties(
    width="container",
    height=300,
    title="Registered cars by fuel type (Pkw-Kraftstoffarten)",
).configure_view(strokeWidth=0)
```

## EV and hybrid share

Share of electric and hybrid cars as a percentage of the total registered fleet.

```{python}
#| echo: false
# Total registered Pkw each month (use Fahrzeugtypen → Personenkraftwagen)
total_pkw = (
    df.filter(
        (pl.col("MONATSZAHL") == "Bestand Fahrzeugtypen")
        & (pl.col("AUSPRAEGUNG") == "Personenkraftwagen")
    )
    .drop_nulls("WERT")
    .rename({"WERT": "total"})
    .select("date", "total")
)

ev_hybrid = (
    fuel.filter(pl.col("fuel_type").is_in(["Electric", "Hybrid"]))
    .join(total_pkw, on="date", how="left")
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("WERT") / pl.col("total") * 100).alias("share_pct")
    )
    .drop_nulls("share_pct")
)

ev_color = alt.Scale(
    domain=["Electric", "Hybrid"],
    range=["#27ae60", "#f39c12"],
)

sel_ev = alt.selection_point(fields=["fuel_type"], bind="legend")

alt.Chart(ev_hybrid).mark_line(strokeWidth=2).encode(
    x=alt.X("date:T", title="Month"),
    y=alt.Y("share_pct:Q", title="Share of registered cars (%)"),
    color=alt.Color(
        "fuel_type:N",
        scale=ev_color,
        legend=alt.Legend(title="Fuel type"),
    ),
    opacity=alt.condition(sel_ev, alt.value(1), alt.value(0.1)),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("date:T", title="Month", format="%b %Y"),
        alt.Tooltip("fuel_type:N", title="Fuel type"),
        alt.Tooltip("share_pct:Q", title="Fleet share", format=".2f"),
    ],
).add_params(sel_ev).properties(
    width="container",
    height=260,
    title="Electric and hybrid share of total registered cars",
).configure_view(strokeWidth=0)
```

## EV count — year-over-year growth

Electric-only registrations per month, illustrating the acceleration in EV
adoption since 2019.

```{python}
#| echo: false
ev_only = (
    fuel.filter(pl.col("fuel_type") == "Electric")
    .drop_nulls("WERT")
    .sort("date")
)

alt.Chart(ev_only).mark_area(
    line={"color": "#27ae60"},
    color=alt.Gradient(
        gradient="linear",
        stops=[
            alt.GradientStop(color="rgba(39,174,96,0.6)", offset=0),
            alt.GradientStop(color="rgba(39,174,96,0.05)", offset=1),
        ],
        x1=1, x2=1, y1=1, y2=0,
    ),
).encode(
    x=alt.X("date:T", title="Month"),
    y=alt.Y("WERT:Q", title="Registered electric cars", axis=alt.Axis(format="~s")),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip("date:T", title="Month", format="%b %Y"),
        alt.Tooltip("WERT:Q", title="Electric cars", format=",.0f"),
    ],
).properties(
    width="container", height=240, title="Total registered electric cars (Elektro)"
).configure_view(strokeWidth=0)
```
